reviews.author: trung duc
reviews.text: Bình Liêu District, located in the northeastern part of Quảng Ninh Province, Vietnam, is a hidden gem known for its stunning natural landscapes, rich culture, and unique ethnic diversity. Situated near the border with China, Bình Liêu is famous for its picturesque rolling hills, lush forests, and charming terraced rice fields, making it an ideal destination for nature lovers and those seeking to explore rural Vietnam. The area is also home to several indigenous ethnic groups, including the Tay, H'mong, and Dzao, offering visitors a chance to experience local traditions, festivals, and cuisine. One of the most popular attractions in Bình Liêu is the Bình Liêu Border Gate, where visitors can explore the scenic views of the mountains and valleys. The district also offers stunning trekking routes, such as the path leading to the Bình Liêu Waterfall, and the famous "White Stone Stairs," a series of natural stone steps carved into the mountainside. These landscapes, combined with the area's serene atmosphere, make Bình Liêu a perfect destination for adventure travelers and those wanting to escape the crowded tourist spots. For international tourists traveling to Bình Liêu from Ha Long, the most common and convenient way is by car. The distance between Ha Long City and Bình Liêu is about 130 kilometers, and the drive takes around 2 to 3 hours, depending on traffic and road conditions. Visitors can hire a private car, take a taxi, or join a local tour from Ha Long to reach Bình Liêu. The journey offers scenic views of the countryside, adding to the experience of exploring this remote and beautiful region.

reviews.author: thangvp pham
reviews.text: A lovely small waterfall, currently open to the public for free. A new tourist area is being developed nearby

reviews.author: HUNG DN
reviews.text: Pretty cold but we saw a kid jump from a high place about 4 floors above water into the water

reviews.author: Huyen Tran
reviews.text: 10k for bike parking, free entrance The road lead to here is very easy to drive, even on a car. The waterfall is nice, with the beautiful blue water. We visited on the January of 2024 so there is not a lot of water. Nice spot to visit when you do the Hoanh Mo loop, or staying in Tien Yen/Binh Lieu town

reviews.author: nguyen ngoc khanh
reviews.text: It is beautiful place. Beautiful waterfall.

reviews.author: Phương Tuấn Minh Phạm (Minhppt)
reviews.text: Hồi Club on the beat May5 on the Flow

reviews.author: Marco Hwang
reviews.text: Very beautiful place suitable for everyone to enjoy the view, you can travel here by motor or bus, carefull when you walk on rock cause is really slippery

reviews.author: Hao Duong
reviews.text: Stunning scenery. You can feel the waterfall from 2miles away

reviews.author: QuangDzung Truong
reviews.text: Nice scenery, not crowded, good for trekking

reviews.author: Ngô Hoàng
reviews.text: Thác KhV văn tuy nhỏ nhưng rất đẹp và dễ đi phù hợp với các bạn thích chill vì đường đi từ móng cái vào nhiều đồi núi rất đẹp và mộc mạc

reviews.author: Nguyễn Huy Vũ
reviews.text: Thác đẹp nhưng lối vào đang xây nên hơi bụi. Mình thì hơm dám vào quá sâu vì hopng biết bơi =))))

reviews.author: 納豆さん
reviews.text: ビンリウの中心部からバイクを使えば30分もせずに到着するでしょう。水の透明度が素晴らしい、秘境の滝。 途中一部かなり道が悪いですが現在工事中で観光開発が進められています。

reviews.author: Ngọc Thái
reviews.text: Thác Khe Vằn khá cao, nếu đến Bình Liêu thì nên đi thác này. Đường đi vào không khó, mùa hè tắm ở đây thì rất mát. Gần đây có làng ăn uống cạnh suối để nghỉ ngơi.

reviews.author: Hiệp Lưu
reviews.text: Thác đẹp, nổi tiếng của Bình Liêu, Quảng Ninh. Vào thác không mất vé. Thác có 3 tầng để khám phá, chú ý trơn trượt. Không có dịch vụ gì, chỉ có vài bà cô dân tộc bán hàng.
